name: Oikolab Weather Data API
description: Access 70+ years of global, hourly historical and forecast weather data from NOAA and ECMWF. Supports datasets including ERA5, ERA5-Land, GFS, GEFS, ICON, GDPS, IFS-OPEN, CFS, SILAM, HRRR, NAM-CONUS, NBM, HRDPS, ICON-EU, and ICON-D2. Data available in JSON, CSV, and NetCDF formats.

apis.name: Oikolab Weather Data API

Supports datasets including ERA5, ERA5-Land, GFS, GEFS, ICON, GDPS, IFS-OPEN, CFS, SILAM, HRRR, NAM-CONUS, NBM, HRDPS, ICON-EU, and ICON-D2. Data available in JSON, CSV, and NetCDF formats.
